description: Example: a partner workflow that extends the client's template-query-render-publish and adds a Slack notification after the prod publish step. Copy this file into your own repo at .fractary/faber/workflows/, change the id, and customize the post_steps. See ../../../docs/client/extending-workflows.md.

post_steps.name: Notify Slack
post_steps.description: Post a one-line message to the partner's Slack incoming webhook after a successful prod publish. Customize the channel and message format for your own org.
post_steps.prompt: Use Bash to POST a JSON body to ${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL} reporting that {asset} was published to prod. Example body: {"text": ":corthography: Published {asset} to prod (run {run_id})"}. Skip the post and log a warning if SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL is unset — do not fail the workflow.

autonomy.description: Inherits the parent's gating: test cycle autonomous, prod cycle requires approval. The Slack notification runs as a post_step inside release, so it fires only after the prod publish step has completed.
